last_commit.message: feat: enrich X articles via browser, add quote tweet support to extractor

recent_changes: Scheduled fetch 2026-03-09: skipped — Chrome extension bug (3 restarts, connected but tabs_context stuck in retry loop)

Notable new: @bcherny /loop (10.3k likes), @weswinder desktop apps (8k), @thejayden Chief of Staff (6.3k), @DataChaz perfect prompt (6.3k), @nicopreme Visual Explainer (5.3k)
Also: @chintanturakhia frequently-run-prompt, @dickson_tsai HTTP hooks, @RayFernando1337 skill-creator update, @RhysSullivan clone-repos, @adocomplete prompt-stashing
Link enrichment: 9 enriched, 7 x.com URLs pending browser extraction, 1 failed (trailing comma in URL)
Media backfill: downloaded 46 media files, analyzed 45 with Gemini Vision (1 JSON parse error), regenerated 49 summaries with media context
Fixed /fetch-bookmarks skill: added missing download_media.py and enrich_media.py steps to Phase 7
known_issues: 4 tweets have empty text — genuinely attachment-only replies, not a parsing bug
Quote tweets not captured in schema or extraction (only quote_count stored)
x.com photo/video URLs (30 remaining) need browser-based enrichment
Obsidian v1.11.7 installed — needs update to 1.12+ for CLI support
Briefing generator produces double @@ in author handles
Pre-compact hook may not capture enough structured context (only STATUS.json)
enrich_media.py: 1 media item failed JSON parse (tweet_2012741829683224584_17.png)
